summary: Found 4 issues: 1 security warning, 1 bug, 2 suggestions. Overall code quality is good with clear intent, but the SQL query construction and missing error handling should be addressed before merge.

findings.title: SQL injection risk
findings.message: Query built with f-string interpolation. User-controlled input could modify the query structure.
findings.suggestion: Use parameterized queries instead of string interpolation.
findings.diff:
- query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}"
+ query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = %s"
+ cursor.execute(query, (user_id,))

findings.title: Unhandled None return
findings.message: The `get_template()` method can return None when the loader fails silently, but the caller assumes a Template object.
findings.suggestion: Add a None check or raise TemplateNotFoundError explicitly.

findings.title: Repeated dict lookup in loop
findings.message: The `self._filters[name]` lookup happens on every iteration. Hoist it above the loop for a minor speedup in hot paths.

findings.title: Test name could be more descriptive
findings.message: `test_render_7` doesn't describe what's being tested. Consider renaming to `test_render_nested_block_inheritance`.

findings.title: Unused import
findings.message: `re.VERBOSE` is imported but never used in this module.
